statistical_anchor: Price rebounded +2.97% to $593.0, reclaiming the 50-day MA at $585.78 after a -4.43% five-day drawdown, but remains -9.59% below the 10-day high of $655.89.
volume_assessment: The +2.97% daily gain occurred on 0.88x average volume, classifying this move as thin tape noise rather than conviction-driven accumulation. Low-volume bounces in a confirmed short-term downtrend historically lack durability and frequently fade into consolidation or retest support.
trend_assessment: Short-term trend remains down_short_term (-1.87% over 3 days) with price at the lower extreme of its recent range (position 0.16). Momentum has paused but not reversed; the bounce is mechanically driven by oversold conditions and MA reclamation rather than exhaustion of selling pressure.
regime_context: VIX at 16.9 and stable 10Y UST at 4.2% establish a normal volatility regime with no macro catalysts this week. This environment historically favors technical mean-reversion within established ranges for high-beta sector ETFs, suppressing decisive directional breakouts until volume or trend structure shifts.
watch_items: Daily close above $600 on >1.2x average volume to confirm trend reversal
Daily close below $585 (50-day MA) to resume short-term downside risk and invalidate support
